meta.spread_convention: spread = DA - RT; positive => DA expensive => short DA / long RT signal
meta.note: Expected gross P&L = sum of (E[Spread] * MW) for active positions: HE10 $105 + HE11 $90 + HE19 $180 + HE20 $720 + HE21 $870 + HE22 $180 = $2,145 gross; note table uses E[Spread]*MW*P(win) convention for Exp Gross: HE10 $52.5 + HE11 $45 + HE19 $90 + HE20 $360 + HE21 $435 + HE22 $90 = $1,072.5; risk-adjusted = $1,072.5 * 0.80 = $858
